category_title: Students with low academic achievement engaging in reflective knowledge-building discourse
scenario_title: Initial interpretation of KCA data focusing on quantitative comparison
minimal_context: The student is looking at the Knowledge Connections Analyzer data to review their online discourse in the visual arts curriculum.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the Knowledge Connections Analyzer data and the prompt sheets for our discussion.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Okay, I am looking at the bar graphs and pie charts. I can see exactly how many posts I made.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think about the results?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: My individual performance is really good. I have the highest numbers on the chart, so I am doing better than the rest of the group.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to look at the rest of the information provided by the tool.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I only notice the quantitative data. I don't really get the qualitative information, I just want to use these numbers to reflect on my own performance and compare it to the others.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the Knowledge Connections Analyzer data and the prompt sheets for our discussion.

STUDENT: Okay, I am looking at the bar graphs and pie charts. I can see exactly how many posts I made.

TUTOR: What do you think about the results?

STUDENT: My individual performance is really good. I have the highest numbers on the chart, so I am doing better than the rest of the group.

TUTOR: Try to look at the rest of the information provided by the tool.

STUDENT: I only notice the quantitative data. I don't really get the qualitative information, I just want to use these numbers to reflect on my own performance and compare it to the others.

task.content: Interpreting KCA data during reflective assessment sessions
task.learning_goal: focus on the main learning goals of knowledge building such as idea improvement, synthesis and rise-above, community knowledge

context.materials: Knowledge Forum software, Knowledge Connections Analyzer (KCA) tool, pie charts, bar graphs, tables, prompt sheets
context.social_setting: reflective assessment using the KCA in a knowledge building environment
context.time_context: Initial use of the Knowledge Connections Analyzer (KCA) tool

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Initial use of the Knowledge Connections Analyzer (KCA) tool to interpret data about their online discourse
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: noticed only the quantitative data generated by the KCA; they did not recognize the cognitive opportunities afforded by the qualitative information provided
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: perceive the assessment data from Knowledge Forum ’ integrated tools as individual-based for comparative purpose

behavior_patterns.condition: when using the KCA data that intended to direct students ’ attention on community performance
